'''zhoshayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberculostatic|tuberculostatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberculostatic|tuberculostatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhoshayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshayithi|zhoshayithi]] || [[word:zhoshayiji|zhoshayiji]] || [[word:zhoshayishi|zhoshayishi]] || [[word:zhoshayiki|zhoshayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshayuthuthu|zhoshayuthuthu]] || [[word:zhoshayujuju|zhoshayujuju]] || [[word:zhoshayushushu|zhoshayushushu]] || [[word:zhoshayukuku|zhoshayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshayuthu|zhoshayuthu]] || [[word:zhoshayuju|zhoshayuju]] || [[word:zhoshayushu|zhoshayushu]] || [[word:zhoshayuku|zhoshayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshayufthuf|zhoshayufthuf]] || [[word:zhoshayufjuf|zhoshayufjuf]] || [[word:zhoshayufshuf|zhoshayufshuf]] || [[word:zhoshayufkuf|zhoshayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshayethe|zhoshayethe]] || [[word:zhoshayeje|zhoshayeje]] || [[word:zhoshayeshe|zhoshayeshe]] || [[word:zhoshayeke|zhoshayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshayothotho|zhoshayothotho]] || [[word:zhoshayojojo|zhoshayojojo]] || [[word:zhoshayoshosho|zhoshayoshosho]] || [[word:zhoshayokoko|zhoshayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshayotho|zhoshayotho]] || [[word:zhoshayojo|zhoshayojo]] || [[word:zhoshayosho|zhoshayosho]] || [[word:zhoshayoko|zhoshayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshayofthof|zhoshayofthof]] || [[word:zhoshayofjof|zhoshayofjof]] || [[word:zhoshayofshof|zhoshayofshof]] || [[word:zhoshayofkof|zhoshayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŠthĂŠ|zhoshayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŠjĂŠ|zhoshayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŠshĂŠ|zhoshayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshayĂŠkĂŠ|zhoshayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshayathatha|zhoshayathatha]] || [[word:zhoshayajaja|zhoshayajaja]] || [[word:zhoshayashasha|zhoshayashasha]] || [[word:zhoshayakaka|zhoshayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshayatha|zhoshayatha]] || [[word:zhoshayaja|zhoshayaja]] || [[word:zhoshayasha|zhoshayasha]] || [[word:zhoshayaka|zhoshayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshayafthaf|zhoshayafthaf]] || [[word:zhoshayafjaf|zhoshayafjaf]] || [[word:zhoshayafshaf|zhoshayafshaf]] || [[word:zhoshayafkaf|zhoshayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhoshayasha|zhoshayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshayshĂ«sha|zhoshayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshayrosha|zhoshayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshaymusha|zhoshaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshayasha|zhoshayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshaynkshĂ«sha|gozhoshaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshaynkrosha|gozhoshaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshaynkmusha|gozhoshaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshaynkyasha|gozhoshaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhoshashayasha|zhoshashayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshashayshĂ«sha|zhoshashayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshashayrosha|zhoshashayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshashaymusha|zhoshashaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshashayasha|zhoshashayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshashaynkshĂ«sha|gozhoshashaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshashaynkrosha|gozhoshashaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshashaynkmusha|gozhoshashaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshashaynkyasha|gozhoshashaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zheshĂŠyasha|zheshĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zheshĂŠyshĂ«sha|zheshĂŠyshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zheshĂŠyrosha|zheshĂŠyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zheshĂŠymusha|zheshĂŠymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zheshĂŠyasha|zheshĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠynkshĂ«sha|gozheshĂŠynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠynkrosha|gozheshĂŠynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠynkmusha|gozheshĂŠynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠynkyasha|gozheshĂŠynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhoshfayasha|zhoshfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshfayshĂ«sha|zhoshfayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshfayrosha|zhoshfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshfaymusha|zhoshfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshfayasha|zhoshfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshfaynkshĂ«sha|gozhoshfaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshfaynkrosha|gozhoshfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshfaynkmusha|gozhoshfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshfaynkyasha|gozhoshfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
